data.db_path: Database file path (relative to your HA config dir)
data.monitored_domains: Domains to monitor (e.g. lock, alarm_control_panel, camera)
data.monitored_device_classes: Device classes to monitor (e.g. door, window, motion)
data.activity_retention_days: Keep activity events (device state, user actions) for (days)
data.buffer_max_events: Write buffer: flush after this many events
data.buffer_flush_seconds: Write buffer: flush at least every (seconds)
